evidence: Section 3 / Figure 2 explicitly frame EvolveR as a closed-loop experience lifecycle of offline self-distillation, online interaction with experience retrieval, and policy evolution via GRPO; the four-paradigm taxonomy in the teaser figure positions this lifecycle as the paper's central novel paradigm.

Ablation Table 2 shows EvolveR (self-distill) beats EvolveR (teacher-distill, GPT-4o-mini) at Qwen2.5-3B (0.382 vs 0.370 average EM) while the teacher wins at 1.5B (0.290 vs 0.270) and 0.5B (0.220 vs 0.150), establishing a capacity-dependent crossover within one controlled comparison.
